title: Upload missing financial proof
body: Attach the latest bank statement before the relief packet can move to finance review.

title: Replace one blurry image
body: Submit one brighter kitchen damage photo so the field review stays complete.

title: Renewal deadline approaching
body: Replace the SSM extract before 30 April 2026 to avoid delays.

title: Watch for assignment update
body: Your road safety complaint is in triage and may be flagged urgent because it affects a school lane.
